'''Goure Conor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] who was staying on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. He greeted the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo family]] upon their arrival, and became a friend to [[Tahiri Veila]].

He was part of a vast Ryn communication network, and directed the Solos to [[Onadax]], where a contact was reportedly awaiting, after the [[Ssi-ruu]]k [[Consecration Ceremony]] had been ended abruptly.

{{Char-stub}}
